prompt: I have an OpenAPI 3.0 document and need TypeScript types to validate its structure. Show me how to define the root OpenAPI object with info, paths, and components using @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openapi types.
assertions: Uses `OpenAPI` type from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openapi to type the root object
Uses `Info` type from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openapi for API metadata (title, version)
Uses `Paths` type for the paths field
Uses `Components` type for the components field
The OpenAPI version string is set to '3.0.1' or '3.0.0'
